jiuwen.auto_harness

jiuwen.auto_harness#

Registry#

class jiuwen.auto_harness.StageRegistry#
register(name: str, stage_cls: Type) → None#
get(name: str) → Type | None#
names() → list[str]#
class jiuwen.auto_harness.PipelineRegistry#
register(name: str, pipeline_cls: Type) → None#
get(name: str) → Type | None#
names() → list[str]#
require(name: str) → Type#

SessionContext#

class jiuwen.auto_harness.SessionContext(orchestrator=None)#
put_artifact(key: str, value) → None#
get_artifact(key: str, default=None) → Any#
clone() → SessionContext#

Stages#

class jiuwen.auto_harness.BaseStage#
name: str
description: str
async execute(ctx: SessionContext) -> StageResult
class jiuwen.auto_harness.StageResult(stage_name: str, status: str = 'success', output: str = '', artifacts: dict = {}, messages: list[str] = [])#
class jiuwen.auto_harness.AssessStage(client: LLMClient)#
class jiuwen.auto_harness.PlanStage(client: LLMClient)#
class jiuwen.auto_harness.ImplementStage(client: LLMClient)#
class jiuwen.auto_harness.VerifyStage(client: LLMClient)#

Pipelines#

class jiuwen.auto_harness.BasePipeline#
name: str
stages: list[BaseStage]
async stream(ctx: SessionContext) -> AsyncIterator[StageResult]
class jiuwen.auto_harness.StandardPipeline(client: LLMClient, fix_loop=None)#
class jiuwen.auto_harness.ExtendedPipeline(client: LLMClient, fix_loop=None)#
class jiuwen.auto_harness.MetaEvolvePipeline(client: LLMClient, experience: ExperienceStore, fix_loop=None)#

Session-level pipeline: assess → plan → per-task implement+verify (with fix loop) → learnings.

class jiuwen.auto_harness.LearningsStage(client: LLMClient, experience: ExperienceStore)#

Post-session reflection stage. Extracts structured learnings from session results.

Orchestrator#

class jiuwen.auto_harness.AutoHarnessOrchestrator(client=None, pipeline_registry=None, stage_registry=None, experience=None, fix_loop=None)#
select_pipeline(name: str | None = None) → str#
async run(task: str, pipeline_name=None) -> dict
async run_stream(task: str, pipeline_name=None) -> AsyncIterator[StageResult]

Fix Loop#

class jiuwen.auto_harness.FixLoopResult(success: bool, attempts: int = 0, phase: int = 1, error_log: list[str] = [], output: str = '')#
class jiuwen.auto_harness.FixLoopController(phase1_max_retries: int = 5, phase2_max_retries: int = 3)#
async run(verify_fn, fix_fn=None, evaluator=None) -> FixLoopResult
should_retry(stage_name: str) → bool#
reset() → None#

Experience#

class jiuwen.auto_harness.ExperienceStore(file_path: str | None = None)#
SUCCESS: str, FAILURE: str, INSIGHT: str
record(stage, task, result, exp_type=SUCCESS) → None#
record_failure(stage, task, error) → None#
record_insight(stage, topic, insight) → None#
search(query: str, top_k: int = 10) → list[dict]#
synthesize(experiences: list[dict], max_tokens: int = 2000) → str#
recent(stage=None, limit=10) → list[dict]#
clear() → None#
